name: 3rd-review
description: Independent, cross-source code review dispatch that an AI agent can't fake its way past.

scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:standalone
scripts.test:core: node scripts/route-review.test.mjs && node scripts/cost-compare.test.mjs && node scripts/verdict-core-hash.test.mjs && node scripts/standalone-passfields.test.mjs
scripts._comment_monorepo: The remaining *.test.mjs / *.test.ts under scripts|verifiers|subreviewers are agenthub-monorepo-coupled (they reference ../../../harness, packages/core/agenthub, or git checkout) and only run inside the agenthub monorepo, NOT in this standalone checkout. See README 'Verifying'.
